title: onagra × braunii
intro: Onagra × braunii, also known as a hybrid of evening primrose and sea rocket, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Onagraceae family. The medicinal properties of Onagra × braunii lie in its seeds, which are rich in essential fatty acids, particularly gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), and have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Onagra × braunii include alleviating symptoms of eczema, reducing inflammation, and supporting heart health. Onagra × braunii is often used in herbal preparations such as capsules, oil, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
